issues.detail: The skill file mentions error handling but does not provide concrete code or detailed guidance for handling all error scenarios and edge cases.

scenarios.name: Welcome email via React Email template
scenarios.rationale: Baseline defaulted to nodemailer with raw HTML strings; treatment built a typed React Email component using @react-email/components and passed it through the react: field of resend.emails.send with {data, error} handling.

scenarios.name: Batched weekly digest with analytics tags
scenarios.rationale: Baseline looped resend.emails.send 80 times without tags; treatment used resend.batch.send with a single payload and per-message tags array of {name, value} pairs for category/campaign/user_id.
